zh.Fritwell, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾福利特維爾
zh.Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Englan: 英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 柏亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pipard II於大約1133年出生在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 柏亞德時，他的父親William Pipard I17歲，母親Joan of Devon21歲。他於大約1171年與Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard在英國林可爾史爾盧斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1194年12月8日享年62歲。

zh-hans.Fritwell, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾福利特維爾
zh-hans.Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Englan: 英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 柏亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pipard II于大约1133年出生在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 柏亞德时，他的父亲William Pipard I17岁，母亲Joan of Devon21岁。他于大约1171年与Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard在英国林可爾史爾盧斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1194年12月8日享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pipard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Normand, Emile, Antoine, Cecile, Jean-Paul, Renald, Adrien, Aime, Andre, Aurel.
nickname from Old French pinard, a small medieval coin, so named from pin ‘pine’ because it bore the device of a pine cone.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pipard II was born about 1133, in Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Pipard I, was 17 and his mother, Joan of Devon, was 21. He married Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard about 1171, in Louth, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 8 December 1194, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pipard II est né environ 1133, à Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Pipard I, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan of Devon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard environ 1171, à Louth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 8 décembre 1194, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pipard II um 1133 in Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pipard I 17 und seine Mutter Joan of Devon 21. Er hat um 1171 in Louth, Lincolnshire, England Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 8. Dezember 1194 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pipard II è nato il circa 1133 nel Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Pipard I, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Joan of Devon, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard circa 1171, nel Louth, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 8 dicembre 1194, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Louth, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアロウス

ja.Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Englan: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド ペッパルド
ja.lifeSummary: William Pipard IIが約1133年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド ペッパルドで生まれた時，父William Pipard Iは17歳，母Joan of Devonは21歳であった。約1171年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロウスでMrs. Joan de Louth Pipardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1194年12月8日に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pipard II(이)가 대략 1133년 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 p파르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pipard I(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan of Devon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1171년 영국 링코실르 루스에서 Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1194년 12월 8일 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1133–about 8 December 1194: tany ho any amin'ny 1133–tany ho any amin'ny 8 desambra 1194

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pipard II nasceu aproximadamente 1133, em Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pipard I, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan of Devon, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard aproximadamente 1171, em Louth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 8 de dezembro de 1194, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pipard II родился около 1133 г. в местности ротирфиелд пеппард, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Pipard I было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan of Devon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard около 1171 г. в местности лоут, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 8 декабря 1194 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Pipard II nació aproximadamente 1133, en Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pipard I, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Joan of Devon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mrs. Joan de Louth Pipard aproximadamente 1171, en Louth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 8 de diciembre de 1194, a la edad de 62 años.
